keyRisks: COO Priya Nair is the key retention risk and the internal CEO option
Commercial recovery under CMO Trevor Hale is only one quarter old — unproven until Q3
New CFO Naomi Okonkwo has ~1 month tenure with no finance bench behind her
portcoSummary.headline: Biggest overhang removed: CFO seat filled with a step-change hire (Naomi Okonkwo) and the commercial engine recovering under Trevor Hale. Retaining COO Priya Nair is the remaining priority while the CEO question stays open.

executives.name: Naomi Okonkwo
indicatorsOfSuccess3to6mo: Sustain the lender-relationship turnaround through the next covenant cycle
Stand up a reliable monthly close and rolling forecast
Define a VP Finance backup in H2

successionShortTerm.successor: None yet — VP Finance to be defined in H2

keyRisks: Assessment rests on ~1 month tenure — durability unproven
No finance bench yet; VP Finance seat unfilled
executives.additionalComments: Seat filled 2026-05-19 by Naomi Okonkwo after a ~5-month vacancy. Prior: SVP Finance at a $400M revenue managed-services platform; owned FP&A, treasury, and the senior lender relationship and led two refinancings. Strong early signal — rebuilt the 13-week cash model the prior CFO never delivered and improved the lender's posture. Scores held green-but-conservative given one month of tenure. directCost ($460K) is an estimate pending comp confirmation.

actionability.recommendation: Support onboarding; convert early momentum into a durable close/forecast cadence and define a VP Finance backup in H2

evidence.finding: Operating partner reports a step-change: in three weeks Naomi rebuilt the 13-week cash model the prior CFO never delivered and shifted the lender's posture in the room.
evidence.quote: In three weeks Naomi rebuilt the 13-week cash model the prior CFO never delivered and walked the lender through it herself. The bank's posture changed in the room. This is a step-change for the finance function.
evidence.speaker: R. Alvarez

evidence.finding: Board chair rates Naomi the strongest finance hire across the portfolio this year, citing FP&A and lender leadership at a $400M platform and two closed refinancings.
evidence.quote: Naomi is the strongest finance hire we've made across the portfolio this year — she ran FP&A and the lender relationship at a $400M revenue services platform and closed two refinancings. The lender conversations are already in better hands.
evidence.speaker: M. Daugherty

evidence.finding: Filling the CFO seat removes the single biggest overhang on the business, per the board chair.
evidence.quote: Filling the CFO seat removes the single biggest overhang on this business.
evidence.speaker: M. Daugherty

derisicingQuestions: Does the early lender turnaround hold through the next covenant cycle?
suggestedActions: Confirm comp and equity package on file
Scope the VP Finance backup hire for H2
riskMitigations: 13-week cash model rebuilt and lender relationship stabilized

insights.title: Step-change hire
insights.detail: Strongest finance hire across the portfolio this year; immediate impact on the cash model and lender relationship.

executives.name: Priya Nair
indicatorsOfSuccess3to6mo: Hold service levels through the leadership turbulence
keyRisks: Flight risk if the CEO situation drags
Key internal CEO option — retention is critical
No internal succession behind her — structural risk if she leaves
executives.additionalComments: The steady hand and the most credible internal CEO candidate — the only one operating at the level the thesis needs. Retain at all costs. Senior team steadier this quarter (CFO hired, CEO stabilized the team), which eases near-term flight risk, but retention stays the priority while the CEO question is open.

actionability.recommendation: Retention package now; position as internal CEO option

evidence.finding: Senior team steadied this quarter, easing the near-term flight risk that was tied to instability at the top.
evidence.quote: he executed the CFO search well and has stabilized the senior team.
evidence.speaker: M. Daugherty

evidence.finding: Priya reported the commercial recovery to the board, signaling she is operating across the leadership gaps at the top.
evidence.quote: Net-new pipeline is up 38% quarter over quarter and we closed two of the three target logos. After two flat quarters this is the first quarter Trevor has delivered against the commercial plan.
evidence.speaker: Priya Nair

derisicingQuestions: Would she take the CEO seat if offered?
suggestedActions: Put a retention grant in place this month
riskMitigations: Senior team steadied this quarter — near-term flight risk eased

executives.name: Trevor Hale
indicatorsOfSuccess3to6mo: Sustain net-new pipeline growth into Q3
Convert the recovered pipeline into closed revenue
executives.whatDroveEVErosion: Commercial engine recovering: net-new pipeline +38% QoQ and two of three target logos closed — the first quarter delivering against plan after two flat quarters (Q1 pipeline coverage 1.4x vs a 3x target). Durability unproven over a single quarter.
keyRisks: Recovery is one quarter old — durability unproven until Q3
Must sustain net-new growth to validate the underwritten growth thesis
executives.additionalComments: Owns the commercial engine central to the growth thesis. First quarter of commercial delivery after two flat quarters (net-new pipeline +38% QoQ, 2 of 3 target logos closed, reported by COO Priya Nair). Upgrade from 'stalled' to 'recovering'. One quarter does not make a trend — watch Q3 for durability before concluding a turnaround.

actionability.recommendation: Hold; validate the recovery over Q3 before any leadership change

evidence.finding: COO reports the first quarter of commercial delivery: net-new pipeline +38% QoQ and two of three target logos closed after two flat quarters.
evidence.quote: Net-new pipeline is up 38% quarter over quarter and we closed two of the three target logos. After two flat quarters this is the first quarter Trevor has delivered against the commercial plan.
evidence.speaker: Priya Nair

evidence.finding: The commercial engine is no longer stalled, though one quarter does not make a trend — the board flags Q3 as the durability test.
evidence.quote: The commercial engine is no longer stalled, though one quarter does not yet make a trend — watch Q3 for durability.

derisicingQuestions: Does net-new growth sustain into Q3, or was this a one-quarter pull-forward?
suggestedActions: Instrument leading indicators of pipeline durability
Reassess at the Q3 board meeting
